# CI/CD Pipeline Setup using GitHub Actions

## Objective
Build a CI/CD pipeline to automate deployment of a web application.

## Tools Used
- Git
- GitHub
- GitHub Actions
- GitHub Pages
- HTML

## Project Workflow
1. Created a simple HTML website
2. Initialized Git repository
3. Pushed project to GitHub
4. Configured GitHub Actions workflow
5. Enabled GitHub Pages
6. Automated deployment successfully

## Workflow File
Location:
.github/workflows/deploy.yml

## Result
Successfully deployed a website using automated CI/CD pipeline.

## Live Website
https://harshbiswas001-lgtm.github.io/ci-cd-task/
